_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: pre-commit-ci[bot]
data.message:
[pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate (#4)

updates:
- [github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks: v4.4.0 → v4.6.0](https://github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks/compare/v4.4.0...v4.6.0)
- [github.com/codespell-project/codespell: v2.2.5 → v2.3.0](https://github.com/codespell-project/codespell/compare/v2.2.5...v2.3.0)
- https://github.com/pre-commit/mirrors-autopep8 → https://github.com/hhatto/autopep8
- [github.com/hhatto/autopep8: v2.0.2 → v2.3.1](https://github.com/hhatto/autopep8/compare/v2.0.2...v2.3.1)
- [github.com/PyCQA/flake8: 6.1.0 → 7.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/flake8/compare/6.1.0...7.1.0)

Co-authored-by: pre-commit-ci[bot] <66853113+pre-commit-ci[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,20 +15,20 @@ repos:
   - id: check-yaml
   - id: check-ast
   - id: double-quote-string-fixer
-  rev: v4.4.0
+  rev: v4.6.0
 - repo: https://github.com/codespell-project/codespell
   hooks:
   - id: codespell
     args:
     - --write-changes
-  rev: v2.2.5
-- repo: https://github.com/pre-commit/mirrors-autopep8
+  rev: v2.3.0
+- repo: https://github.com/hhatto/autopep8
   hooks:
   - id: autopep8
-  rev: v2.0.2
+  rev: v2.3.1
 - repo: https://github.com/PyCQA/flake8
   hooks:
   - id: flake8
-  rev: 6.1.0
+  rev: 7.1.0
 ci:
   autoupdate_schedule: quarterly

@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+# social_nav_ros
+ROS packages for supporting and analyzing social navigation
